commands.repair_reason: - No automated repair lane is needed; the remaining action is maintainer landing judgment and any broader validation desired for an automation-routing change.; Cleared: The diff changes local test scripts, tests, and guidance only; it adds no dependency, workflow, secret, network, or package-resolution surface. (sha=fd661097aed0df6887a69bbd302fdb237d01d7e5)
commands.review_summary:
The PR routes simple explicit-file `scripts/run-vitest.mjs` calls through `scripts/test-projects.mjs`, preserves direct Vitest behavior for option-sensitive cases, adds active-memory/Codex shard ordering, and updates tests and local testing guidance.

PR surface: Tests +160, Docs +4, Other +123. Total +287 across 7 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source and PR proof: current main sends explicit-file wrapper calls through direct Vitest startup, while the PR body shows the watchdog/timing repro and after-fix completions. I did not execute the commands in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - No automated repair lane is needed; the remaining action is maintainer landing judgment and any broader validation desired for an automation-routing change.

target.title: perf(test): fix explicit-file Vitest wrapper hangs
target.body:
## Summary

- Route simple explicit-file `scripts/run-vitest.mjs` invocations through the existing `scripts/test-projects.mjs` project router so single-file agent proof does not load the full root Vitest project matrix.
- Keep direct Vitest behavior for explicit config/root/project, watch/dev mode, and separate option-value invocations where project-router parsing could change semantics.
- Add the missing active-memory and Codex extension project-router kinds so delegated explicit extension tests run real shards instead of being skipped.

## Timing Proof

| Case | Command | Result |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Before this patch, temporary copy of `HEAD:scripts/run-vitest.mjs` with a 5s idle watchdog | `OPENCLAW_VITEST_NO_OUTPUT_TIMEOUT_MS=5000 node scripts/.run-vitest-before.$PID.mjs test/scripts/dependency-guard-workflow.test.ts` | No Vitest output before watchdog; SIGTERM at 5s, forced SIGKILL after another 5s; `/usr/bin/time -p` reported `real 13.92`, `user 13.02`, `sys 0.85`. |
| After this patch | `/usr/bin/time -p node scripts/run-vitest.mjs test/scripts/dependency-guard-workflow.test.ts` | Selected `test/vitest/vitest.tooling.config.ts`, 7 tests passed; `[test] passed ... in 2.36s`; `/usr/bin/time -p` reported `real 2.48`, `user 2.01`, `sys 0.29`. |
| Reported Minimax example after this patch | `/usr/bin/time -p node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/minimax/oauth.test.ts` | Selected `test/vitest/vitest.extension-providers.config.ts`, 4 tests passed; `[test] passed ... in 4.26s`; `/usr/bin/time -p` reported `real 4.31`, `user 3.97`, `sys 1.11`. |
| Reported changelog attribution example after this patch | `/usr/bin/time -p node scripts/run-vitest.mjs test/scripts/check-changelog-attributions.test.ts` | Selected `test/vitest/vitest.tooling.config.ts`, 8 tests passed; `[test] passed ... in 2.67s`; `/usr/bin/time -p` reported `real 2.72`, `user 2.33`, `sys 0.58`. |

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs test/scripts/run-vitest.test.ts` - 31 tests passed.
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs test/scripts/test-projects.test.ts` - 103 tests passed.
- `/usr/bin/time -p node scripts/run-vitest.mjs test/scripts/dependency-guard-workflow.test.ts` - 7 tests passed; `real 2.48`.
- `/usr/bin/time -p node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/minimax/oauth.test.ts` - 4 tests passed; `real 4.31`.
- `/usr/bin/time -p node scripts/run-vitest.mjs test/scripts/check-changelog-attributions.test.ts` - 8 tests passed; `real 2.72`.
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/codex/index.test.ts` - 7 tests passed.
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/active-memory/index.test.ts` - 127 tests passed.
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 scripts/run-vitest.mjs scripts/test-projects.test-support.mjs test/scripts/run-vitest.test.ts test/scripts/test-projects.test.ts` - passed.
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local` - clean, no accepted/actionable findings.

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Bare explicit-file `scripts/run-vitest.mjs <file>` agent runs no longer stall in the root multi-project Vitest startup path for the reported examples; they select the narrow project shard and run the requested file.

Real environment tested: Local macOS source checkout on branch `vitest-hanging`, Node 24.16.0, pnpm 11.2.2.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: See the Verification section above.

Evidence after fix: The three reported examples completed and printed their selected shard. `test/scripts/dependency-guard-workflow.test.ts` improved from forced-kill at `real 13.92` with a 5s watchdog to a successful run at `real 2.48`.

Observed result after fix: The wrapper delegates simple explicit-file invocations to `test-projects.mjs`, preserves direct Vitest behavior for option-heavy/watch/config/root/project cases, and routes active-memory/Codex extension targets to real extension configs.

What was not tested: Full Vitest suite, full `pnpm check`, remote Testbox/Crabbox proof.
target.author: romneyda

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
